questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls onto ramp_left at (4,1), ramp_left at (3,2), landing on bit A at (5,2) which points left (state 0), directing the ball to flip it to the right.

questions.question: After both blue balls are dropped, what is the state of bits A and B?
questions.answer: Both bits A and B are flipped to the right (state 1).

questions.question: Describe the path of the second blue ball.
questions.answer: The second blue ball follows the same path, now that bit A points right, directing it to the right side where it lands on bit B, flipping it to the right.
